title: The Cog Works SMP (server version)
description: This is the server version of the Cog Works SMP mod pack.
body:
This is the server version of the Cog Works SMP modpack.
this pack is for use for dedicated server hoasting and dose not have all of the features of the [Client Version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-cog-works-smp-pack).

the forge version quark is used in this pack here is the link: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)

note: wen instaling this to a server make sure to go into the simple voice chat config file and seting the port. other wise your server will crash.
